articles.title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
articles.summary: Gradient Labs leverages GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 models to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows. The system provides low latency and high reliability for customer service automation.

articles.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
articles.summary: Google releases Veo 3.1 Lite, a cost-effective video generation model now available in paid preview through the Gemini API. The model is also accessible for testing in Google AI Studio.

articles.title: The latest AI news we announced in March 2026
articles.summary: Google provides a roundup of their latest AI updates and announcements from March 2026.

articles.title: We're creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil's forests
articles.summary: Google partners with the Brazilian government to develop satellite imagery mapping technology for forest protection. The initiative aims to combat deforestation through AI-powered monitoring.

articles.title: Agent-driven development in Copilot Applied Science
articles.summary: GitHub shares insights from using coding agents to build agents that automate parts of development work. The post explores lessons learned about working effectively with AI coding assistants.

articles.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
articles.summary: OpenAI raises $3 billion from retail investors as part of a massive $122 billion funding round. The round is led by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, valuing the AI lab at $852 billion as it approaches an IPO.

articles.title: Salesforce announces an AI-heavy makeover for Slack, with 30 new features
articles.summary: Salesforce unveils a major AI transformation for Slack with 30 new features. The update significantly enhances Slack's capabilities with AI-powered functionality.

articles.title: Claude Code leak exposes a Tamagotchi-style 'pet' and an always-on agent
articles.summary: A source code leak from Claude Code's update reveals over 512,000 lines of code exposing internal workings. The leak suggests features including a Tamagotchi-style virtual pet and always-on agent capabilities.

articles.title: Baidu's robotaxis froze in traffic, creating chaos
articles.summary: Multiple Baidu Apollo robotaxis froze simultaneously in Wuhan, China, trapping passengers and causing traffic disruption. Police received numerous reports of robotaxis stopping in streets and being unable to move, though no injuries were reported.

articles.title: Yupp shuts down after raising $33M from a16z crypto's Chris Dixon
articles.summary: Crowdsourced AI model feedback startup Yupp is closing less than a year after launching with significant funding from Silicon Valley investors. The closure highlights challenges in the AI feedback and evaluation space.

articles.title: AI can push your Stream Deck buttons for you
articles.summary: Elgato's Stream Deck 7.4 update introduces Model Context Protocol support, allowing AI assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and Nvidia G-Assist to control Stream Deck actions. Users can now delegate button presses to chatbots while maintaining the same action setup process.

articles.title: ASI-Evolve: AI Accelerates AI
articles.summary: Introduces an agentic framework for AI-for-AI research that closes the loop through a learn-design-experiment-analyze cycle. ASI-Evolve augments standard research workflows to enable AI systems to accelerate their own development.

articles.title: The Future of AI is Many, Not One
articles.summary: Argues that current generative AI approaches are fundamentally individual-focused and proposes abandoning this paradigm for AI to support groundbreaking innovation. The paper draws on complex systems research to advocate for multi-agent approaches.

articles.title: Drop the Hierarchy and Roles: How Self-Organizing LLM Agents Outperform Designed Structures
articles.summary: Large-scale computational experiment across 25,000 tasks shows that autonomous multi-agent LLM systems emerge specialized roles spontaneously. The study demonstrates that self-organization outperforms externally imposed hierarchical structures.

articles.title: Towards Computational Social Dynamics of Semi-Autonomous AI Agents
articles.summary: First comprehensive study documenting emergent social organization among AI agents in hierarchical multi-agent systems. The research observes spontaneous formation of labor unions, criminal syndicates, and proto-nation-states in production AI deployments.

articles.title: Mimosa Framework: Toward Evolving Multi-Agent Systems for Scientific Research
articles.summary: Introduces Mimosa, an evolving multi-agent framework that automatically synthesizes task-specific workflows and refines them through experimental feedback. The system addresses limitations of fixed workflows in Autonomous Scientific Research systems.

articles.title: datasette-extract 0.3a0
articles.summary: New alpha release of datasette-extract tool for data extraction workflows.

articles.title: llm 0.30
articles.summary: Major version update to the llm command-line tool for working with large language models.

articles.title: Supply Chain Attack on Axios Pulls Malicious Dependency from npm
articles.summary: Security alert about a supply chain attack targeting the popular Axios HTTP client library through a malicious npm dependency.
